prompt.content:
Assume the following changes to the RMBS and SLAB merger model
- % cash consideration is 27%
- advisory fees are 1.00%
- update the Bidder's EV/EBITDA Multiple to the average of the 1) Weighted Average EV/EBITDA multiple used in the ONTO Merger Analysis, 2) Weighted Average EV/EBITDA multiple used in the MTSI Merger Analysis, and 3) RMBS' EV to Operating Cash Flow multiple as of 12/31/2024 

Output a 2x2 table for Pro Forma Combined Equity Value, rounded to the nearest whole number in thousands, where
- the two rows are SLAB's net debt as equal to and double 2016 balance sheet net debt, defined as short-term debt plus long-term debt less cash and cash equivalents
- the two columns are the updated Bidder's EV/EBITDA Multiple increased by the Bid Premium and double the Bid Premium

rubrics.name: States Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 100% of 2016 net debt and the bid... (ver_62c25472cb34461a81b40b4e42adce38)

messages.content: States Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 100% of 2016 net debt and the bid premium on top of the updated EV/EBITDA multiple is $12,643,355 thousand (acceptable range 199 to 203).

rubrics.name: States Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 100% of 2016 net debt and double the... (ver_8a10fd806ddc41ce9b6289cef8061999)

messages.content: States Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 100% of 2016 net debt and double the bid premium on top of the updated EV/EBITDA multiple is $14,973,649 thousand (acceptable range 199 to 203).

rubrics.name: States Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 200% of 2016 net debt and the bid... (ver_2e7a78c5208a4d5f9203f53c3db8d37d)

messages.content: States Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 200% of 2016 net debt and the bid premium on top of the updated EV/EBITDA multiple is $12,712,647 thousand (acceptable range 199 to 203).

rubrics.name: States Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 200% of 2016 net debt and double the... (ver_ec9591122c3a4e25ab1a62340058b9da)

messages.content: States Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 200% of 2016 net debt and double the bid premium on top of the updated EV/EBITDA multiple is $15,042,941 thousand (acceptable range 199 to 203).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 100% of 2016 net debt and the bid premium on top of the updated EV/EBITDA multiple is $12,643,355 thousand
Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 100% of 2016 net debt and double the bid premium on top of the updated EV/EBITDA multiple is $14,973,649 thousand
Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 200% of 2016 net debt and the bid premium on top of the updated EV/EBITDA multiple is $12,712,647 thousand
Pro Forma Combined Equity Value at 200% of 2016 net debt and double the bid premium on top of the updated EV/EBITDA multiple is $15,042,941 thousand
